title: Question: Does podman respect UFW firewall rules on ubuntu?
body:
Hi all,

Just wondering if any ubuntu users could tell me whether podman respects / works with UFW firewall rules? Docker bypasses them completely which is a major security issue that's been written about for years but still hasn't been addressed.

Cheers! :)

comments.body: Podman uses CNI for networking, so this question would be better directed there - but I'm fairly certain the answer is no. CNI seems to mostly call directly into IPTables, though I think it may have support for interfacing with firewalld as well.
Rootless podman obeys the system firewall configuration as well as rootless docker
closing unless there is an action for us ... re-open if needed
